meta.description: Cleanroom test fixture for cartograph plug + ribbon work. ONE 4-way X intersection at origin where each corner exercises a DIFFERENT ped-zone pairing — NE = sidewalk/treelawn-and-sidewalk, NW = tl+sw/tl+sw, SE = sidewalk/sidewalk, SW = tl+sw/sidewalk. Authored at the centerline level; intersection records auto-generated by cartograph/derive-toy.js. Re-run that script after editing this file.

measure._comment_right: right side (east) — sidewalk only, no treelawn
right side (south) — sidewalk only, no treelawn

_comment_corners: NE = NS.right(sw) + EW.left(tl+sw); NW = NS.left(tl+sw) + EW.left(tl+sw); SE = NS.right(sw) + EW.right(sw); SW = NS.left(tl+sw) + EW.right(sw)
